tvout_begin.message0: initialize TVout %1 standard %2 width %3 height %4 font %5
tvout_begin.tooltip: Create and start a TVout video signal. Width should be divisible by 8.

tvout_end.tooltip: Stop video output and release the frame buffer.

tvout_select_font.tooltip: Select the bitmap font used by TVout text printing.

tvout_clear.tooltip: Clear the TVout frame buffer to black.

tvout_fill.tooltip: Fill or invert the whole TVout frame buffer.

tvout_set_pixel.message0: TVout %1 draw pixel x %2 y %3 color %4
tvout_set_pixel.tooltip: Set, clear, or invert one pixel.

tvout_get_pixel.tooltip: Read one pixel. Returns 0 for black and 1 for white.

tvout_draw_line.message0: TVout %1 draw line x1 %2 y1 %3 x2 %4 y2 %5 color %6

tvout_draw_rect.message0: TVout %1 draw rectangle x %2 y %3 width %4 height %5 outline %6 fill %7
tvout_draw_rect.tooltip: Draw an outline or filled rectangle.

tvout_draw_circle.message0: TVout %1 draw circle x %2 y %3 radius %4 outline %5 fill %6
tvout_draw_circle.tooltip: Draw an outline or filled circle.

tvout_shift.tooltip: Shift the frame buffer in one direction.

tvout_print.tooltip: Print text or a number at the current cursor.

tvout_println.tooltip: Print text or a number followed by a new line.

tvout_print_at.message0: TVout %1 print at x %2 y %3 text %4
tvout_print_at.tooltip: Print text or a number at a screen position.

tvout_millis.tooltip: Milliseconds since video output was started.

tvout_resolution.tooltip: Read the current horizontal or vertical screen resolution.

tvout_tone.message0: TVout %1 tone frequency %2 Hz duration %3 ms
tvout_tone.tooltip: Play a tone on the TVout sound pin. Use duration 0 for continuous tone.
